message:
feat(core): add traceability verification pack for capability/architecture mapping (ft-3681t.1.5)

VerificationPack validates TraceabilityMatrix with 10 checks across 4
categories (schema, completeness, consistency, coverage). Computes
per-domain coverage, gap risk assessments, and pack verdicts
(Complete/ConditionalPass/Incomplete). 23 unit tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
